reason: Backend conventions for any server-side implementation of external engine bindings, drafts, tasks, billing integration, and API contracts.
Frontend conventions if the implementation adds confirmation, binding, or draft review UI under the server package frontend layer.
Client frontend conventions for any user-facing binding, review, or billing display surfaces.
Shared type conventions if the external engine contract or billing DTOs are added to shared package types.
Cross-layer and reuse thinking guides are relevant because this task spans contracts, billing, backend services, and frontend review flow.
Task-specific cross-system interaction design, including common/base sections, business fields, and token billing contract.
